header.restart_device_confirm: Restart the device? The connection will be lost. Please refresh the page after it comes back.
header.device_name_length_error: Device name length must be between 1 and 32 characters
header.device_name_illegal: Device name can only contain Chinese, English, numbers, underscores, and hyphens

login.password_length_error: Password length must be between 8 and 32 characters
login.username_password_error: Please enter the username and password

device_tool.title: Inference Service
device_tool.preview_desc: Off shows the original screen; on shows the inference result
device_tool.sys_clk_reboot_hint: Takes effect after the next reboot or wake-up.
device_tool.sys_clk_no_valid_profile: No valid saved profile yet; the value below is a suggested default until you save.
device_tool.sys_clk_saved_toast: Profile saved. Reboot the device to apply.
device_tool.sys_clk_reboot_toast: Profile saved. Reboot the device to apply.
device_tool.scheduled_interval_note: Starts from the specified time daily, repeating at set interval
device_tool.ai_desc: To allow model inference, simply activate this option, which is turned on by default
device_tool.model_desc: Choose a built-in model or upload a local one for debugging
device_tool.camera_desc: Configurable camera power consumption mode, working mode and trigger conditions
device_tool.import_and_output_desc:
Import: Select and import the model, firmware, and configuration file, then save and enable it 
 Export: Export models, firmware, and configurations
device_tool.trigger_desc: Configure the trigger method for camera operation
device_tool.pir_note: PIR can wake up the device for capture
device_tool.dynamic_adjust_note: Dynamic real-time adjustment of model parameters to validate inference results
device_tool.timing_capture_note: Timing capture or interval capture can be set
device_tool.remote_control_note: Remotely trigger wake-up and snapshots via MQTT.
device_tool.preview_disconnected: Preview disconnected, please check the latest page.
device_tool.stream_key_length_error: Secret Key length cannot exceed 128 characters
device_tool.sensitivity_level_note: The smaller the value, the more sensitive the infrared change, the farther the detection distance/easier to trigger. Indoor recommended 30-40
device_tool.ignore_time_note: After triggering, ignore new triggers within this time. The time corresponding to N = N*0.5+0.5 seconds. Example: 7→7*0.5+0.5=4 seconds
device_tool.pulse_count_note: The number of pulses to be sent after triggering. Increasing this value can improve anti-interference, but slightly reduce response speed.
device_tool.window_time_note: The maximum time window for pulse occurrence. The time corresponding to M = M*2+2 seconds. Example: 0-2 seconds.
device_tool.disable_pir_in_preview_note: When enabled, PIR triggers are suppressed while any preview stream (Web/RTSP) is active, preventing stutter during installation. PIR capture resumes normally once the preview is closed. Sleep wake-up is unaffected.

model_verification.json_result: JSON inference results will be shown here
model_verification.json_result_desc: JSON inference results will be shown here
model_verification.model_unloaded: Model not loaded, please upload the model in the feature debugging

application_management.topic_receive_error: Data receiving topic cannot exceed 128 characters
application_management.topic_report_error: Data reporting topic cannot exceed 128 characters
application_management.ca_cert_data_error: CA certificate data cannot be empty
application_management.client_cert_data_error: Client certificate data cannot be empty
application_management.private_key_data_error: Private key data cannot be empty
application_management.username_illegal: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores
application_management.password_illegal: Password can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores
application_management.confirm_protocol_change: Are you sure you want to change the protocol?
application_management.confirm_protocol_change_description: After changing the protocol, the device will disconnect the MQTT connection, please confirm whether to continue
application_management.ca_cert_tooltip: CA certificate is used to verify the legality of the server certificate
application_management.webhook_url_error: URL must start with http:// or https:// and be ≤ 256 characters
application_management.webhook_secret_error: Secret is required when authentication is enabled
application_management.webhook_ca_cert_tooltip: Import a custom CA root certificate for verifying HTTPS connections to your server. If not set, the built-in CA bundle (Let's Encrypt ISRG X1, GlobalSign R3, DigiCert G2) is used.

hardware_management.grayscale_hint: When enabled, ISP applies a grayscale look (PIPE1 stays RGB565), disables AWB, and uses a luma matrix; takes effect after reboot
hardware_management.grayscale_reboot_hint: Grayscale setting saved. Restart the device or wait until the next wake-up for it to take effect
hardware_management.camera_config_reboot_hint: After modification, it needs to be restarted or the next wake-up will take effect
hardware_management.isp_mode_reboot_toast: ISP mode saved. Reboot the device or wait until the next wake-up for it to take effect
hardware_management.capture_config_tip: The capture configuration is only effective when the camera is in the sleep state and the wake-up source is triggered to take photos
hardware_management.capture_reboot_toast: Capture configuration saved. Reboot the device or wait until the next wake-up for it to take effect
hardware_management.capture_jpeg_quality_tip: The higher the JPEG quality of the capture, the larger the image (once it exceeds 1M, it will be automatically chunked uploaded), the upload time will be extended
hardware_management.capture_storage_ai: Save AI-drawn result image to storage

system_management.confirm_connect_wifi: Are you sure you want to modify the device information? After modifying the device information, you need to reconnect to the local Wi-Fi
system_management.halow_forget_network_confirm: This will clear saved HaLow Wi-Fi info (SSID, password, BSSID, etc.) on the device. Continue?
system_management.refresh_desc: Refreshing the network may cause the network to disconnect, and you need to reconnect to the network
system_management.network_disconnected: Network disconnected, please reconnect to the network
system_management.app_file: Please upload or drag App file to this area
system_management.web_file: Please upload or drag Web file to this area
system_management.fsbl_file: Please upload or drag FSBL file to this area
system_management.ai_model_file: Please upload or drag AI model file to this area
system_management.device_file: Please upload or drag device file to this area
system_management.wifi_file: Please upload or drag WiFi firmware file to this area
system_management.wifi_written_pending_upgrade: WiFi firmware has been written to flash. Click "Confirm Upgrade" to apply the new firmware.
system_management.wifi_upgrade_loading: WiFi firmware upgrading, this may take a while. Please watch the device LED and do NOT power off or disconnect…
system_management.upgrade_confirm_warning:
WiFi firmware upgrade takes a few minutes. The device will reboot and load the new firmware during the upgrade. Do NOT power off or disconnect, otherwise the device may become unrecoverable.

Please confirm the correct WiFi firmware has been uploaded before starting.
system_management.upgrade_in_progress_intro: WiFi firmware upgrade may take a while. The device is rebooting and loading new firmware and cannot be reached during this time. Check the LED status below to gauge the upgrade progress.
system_management.upgrade_led_blinking: LED fast blinking: the device is still upgrading, please keep waiting.
system_management.upgrade_led_steady: LED steady on: upgrade complete, please reconnect to the device WiFi.
system_management.upgrade_led_other: LED in any other state: long-press the device capture button for over 2 seconds and release to wake the device, then try to find the device network.
system_management.confirm_change_login_password: Are you sure you want to modify the login password? After modifying the login password, you need to log in again
system_management.new_password_cannot_be_the_same: New password cannot be the same as the old password
system_management.device_restarting: Device is restarting, please refresh the page later
system_management.no_network: No network detected, please refresh the network
system_management.firmware_upgrade_success: Firmware burned successfully, please reconnect to the device
system_management.wifi_upgrade_available_desc: New version of WiFi firmware detected. Upgrade now?
system_management.fw_mismatch_fsbl_desc: Current FSBL version is {current}, expected {expected}. Please upgrade the FSBL firmware.
system_management.fw_mismatch_wifi_desc: Current WiFi firmware version is {current}, expected {expected}. Please upgrade the WiFi firmware.
system_management.cellular_pin_code_note: Used to unlock SIM cards with locks, usually not configured
system_management.confirm_switch_communication_mode: Are you sure you want to switch communication mode?
system_management.confirm_switch_wifi_mode: Are you sure you want to switch Wi-Fi communication mode? After switching to Wi-Fi communication mode, the network may be disconnected, please confirm whether to continue
system_management.send_at_command: Sending AT command will disconnect the cellular network, please confirm whether to continue
system_management.power_recovery_delay_note: Power recovery delay time, in milliseconds

storage_management.fs_error_msg: The internal Flash filesystem is abnormal or corrupt and its capacity can't be read. You can try formatting to repair it — this erases ALL data on internal Flash (logs, captures).
storage_management.format_confirm_step1: This will erase ALL data on the internal Flash filesystem (logs, capture records, etc.). This cannot be undone. Device config (NVS) is unaffected. Continue?
storage_management.format_confirm_step2: Final confirmation: clicking the button below starts formatting immediately. ALL internal Flash data will be permanently deleted!

file_browsing.title: File Manager
file_browsing.name: Name
file_browsing.edit_load_failed: Failed to load file for editing
file_browsing.delete_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to delete
file_browsing.delete_confirm_dir_suffix: folder? ALL files inside will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
file_browsing.delete_dir_warning: Deleting a folder will also delete all files and subfolders inside
file_browsing.batch_delete_confirm_msg: Delete selected files? If folders are included, ALL contents will be deleted. This cannot be undone.
file_browsing.delete_confirm: Deleted files can't be restored. Confirm deletion?
file_browsing.format_confirm_msg: Formatting will permanently delete ALL data on internal Flash (captures, logs, etc.). Enter device password to confirm:
file_browsing.formatting_msg: Formatting internal Flash, do not power off the device or perform other operations...

capture_settings.flash_limit_auto_wrap: ⚠ When no SD card, flash stores at most {max} records. Exceeded records are automatically deleted. Insert an SD card to remove this limit.
capture_settings.flash_limit_auto_stop: ⚠ When no SD card, flash stores at most {max} records. New captures will be rejected when full. Insert an SD card to remove this limit.
capture_settings.flash_limit_flash_wrap: ⚠ Internal flash stores at most {max} records. Exceeded records are automatically deleted. Switch to SD card to remove this limit.
capture_settings.flash_limit_flash_stop: ⚠ Internal flash stores at most {max} records. New captures will be rejected when full. Switch to SD card to remove this limit.
capture_settings.upload_net_hint: On wake-capture, only the selected netif is initialized; Default keeps current behavior (multi-netif by priority)
capture_settings.schedule_hint: At each scheduled time, the device wakes and uploads all pending images.
capture_settings.retry_hint: When enabled, failed uploads are retried after the next capture uploads successfully. Unavailable for Store-Only or No-Storage modes.
capture_settings.saved_reboot_hint: Configuration saved. Camera parameters take effect after reboot or next wake-up
capture_settings.filter_both_required: Please set both From and To
